_description: Audit baseline — known non-issues and by-design states. Any audit must read this file first and suppress flagged items.

data/sky_monitor.json.reason: GSM Pause Delay check is inline in cycle_runner.py:1289 as APY fallback. No separate daemon file needed.

data/pnl_history.json.reason: PnL history tracked via paper_evidence_history.json and equity_curve_daily.json. pnl_history.json is an old reference.

autopush_launchd.note: com.spa.autopush.plist lives at ~/Library/LaunchAgents/ — only valid on macOS host, NOT in Linux sandbox.

golive_autopush_installed.note: GoLiveChecker._check_autopush_installed() checks ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.spa.autopush.plist. Always fails in Linux sandbox. On Mac: 26/26 is the target.

data/tournament_results.json.note: Regenerated every cycle by cycle_runner. After cycle restart or code push, may be stale for 1 cycle. composite_score=0.0 is correct when days_running < 14 (MIN_OBS).

data/equity_curve_daily.json.note: Contains 20 warmup entries (is_warmup: true, dates < 2026-06-10). These are synthetic seed data for algorithm warm-start. Not a bug.

data/gap_monitor.json.note: dates field may be empty list [] — gap_monitor tracks last_entry_date, not full history array. status: ok is the relevant field.

spark_susds.reason: SparkSusds T1 adapter approved via inline GSM gate in cycle_runner (fallback APY 4.6%). sky_monitor.py exists as module for future on-chain verification.

excluded_by_design.S8: sFRAX T2 — excluded from tournament pending more data
excluded_by_design.S9: Pendle YT speculation T3 — high risk, separate evaluation
excluded_by_design.S10: Pendle YT v2 — T3, excluded pending stability

cycle_runner_tournament.note: cycle_runner manually constructs tournament strategies. strategy_registry.py has full list but tournament subset is intentional.

pendle_pt_rest.py.note: Referenced in old CLAUDE.md table. File was consolidated into spa_core/execution/adapters/pendle_pt_adapter.py. Reference is stale documentation, not a missing file.

push_scripts.note: scripts/push_v*.sh files with number <= autopush_state.json:last_version are dead/already-pushed. ~180 old scripts (v809-v1208) are expected clutter. smart_autopush.py ignores them correctly.
